name: ship-it
goal: Create a mega-build skill that automates steps 3-9 of the build workflow: save plan, pre-mortem, review, PRD, worktree creation, execute-prd, final review, wrap — so the builder can say /ship and walk away.

userStories.title: Install and configure pi-worktrees extension
userStories.description: Install `@zenobius/pi-worktrees` globally and configure for Areté. Set parentDir to `../arete.worktrees/{{name}}` and onCreate to `npm install`.

userStories.title: Create ship skill structure
userStories.description: Create `.pi/skills/ship/` with SKILL.md (main skill definition with workflow, gates, error handling), orchestrator.md (ship orchestrator agent persona and decision-making), and templates/ship-report.md (final summary report template).
acceptanceCriteria: SKILL.md defines complete workflow with all gates
Orchestrator persona documented with gate decision criteria
Report template includes: phases completed, time taken, artifacts created, PR link

userStories.title: Implement pre-build phase (save → pre-mortem → review)
userStories.description: Orchestrator runs: 1) Save plan to current plan directory, 2) Run pre-mortem via `run-pre-mortem` skill, 3) Run cross-model review via `review-plan` skill. Gate logic: Pre-mortem pauses if any CRITICAL risk; Review pauses if structural blockers.
acceptanceCriteria: Gate logic correctly pauses on CRITICAL risks
Gate logic correctly pauses on structural blockers
Clear error message when paused, explaining why and what to do

userStories.title: Implement memory review phase
userStories.description: Before PRD creation, orchestrator: 1) Searches `memory/entries/` for entries from last 14 days, 2) Searches for entries matching plan keywords, 3) Checks LEARNINGS.md in directories plan touches, 4) Reviews `memory/collaboration.md`. Produces 3-5 bullet synthesis of insights to inform PRD.
acceptanceCriteria: Recent entries (14 days) retrieved and summarized
Keyword search finds relevant past work
LEARNINGS.md files in relevant directories are read
Synthesis is concise (3-5 bullets) and actionable
Synthesis is included in PRD handoff context

userStories.title: Implement PRD creation and commit phase
userStories.description: Orchestrator: 1) Converts plan to PRD using `plan-to-prd` skill (informed by memory synthesis), 2) Creates `prd.json` for autonomous execution, 3) Commits all artifacts: `git commit -m "plan: <slug> - PRD and artifacts"`.
acceptanceCriteria: PRD created with memory insights incorporated
All plan artifacts committed (plan.md, pre-mortem.md, review.md, prd.md, prd.json)
Commit message follows convention: `plan: <slug> - PRD and artifacts`

userStories.title: Implement worktree creation and terminal launch
userStories.description: Orchestrator: 1) Creates worktree via pi-worktrees, 2) Detects platform (macOS/Linux/Windows), 3) Opens appropriate terminal in worktree directory, 4) Starts pi in worktree. Cross-platform terminal commands: macOS (osascript → iTerm), Linux (gnome-terminal or xterm), Windows (wt).
acceptanceCriteria: Graceful fallback if terminal launch fails (message with manual instructions)

userStories.title: Implement build and wrap phase
userStories.description: In worktree, orchestrator: 1) Executes PRD via `execute-prd` skill, 2) Spawns eng lead for final review, 3) Runs wrap (memory entry, LEARNINGS update, index), 4) Commits with message `feat: <slug> - implementation`, 5) Generates ship report. Gate logic: Build pauses if any task fails quality gates; Final review pauses if major rework needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Eng lead review spawned after build completion

userStories.title: Implement /ship cleanup command
userStories.description: New command `/ship cleanup <slug>`: 1) Checks if branch is merged to main, 2) If merged: removes worktree, deletes branch, 3) If not merged: warns user, requires confirmation to force-remove.
acceptanceCriteria: Merged branches: worktree removed, branch deleted
Unmerged branches: warning shown, confirmation required
